experiment: FG1/P2-foreground-aware crop: ResNet34-U-Net + CBSA + MKDC with mask-guided training patches
note: Model architecture is unchanged from P2. Only training data sampling is changed: images/masks are resized to 640 and cropped to 512; 33 percent of training patches are forced to contain foreground caries pixels. Validation/test remain whole-image resize 512 without mask-guided cropping.
